results.rendered_html:
āgrahāyaṇa(ṇi)ka a. [āgrahāyaṇyāṃ deyamṛṇaṃ vuñ ṭhañ vā  P. IV. 3. 50 ] To be paid on the full moon day in mārgaśīrṣa (as debt.).
— kaḥ (-ṇikaḥ) [āgrahāyaṇī paurṇimāsyasmin māse ṭhak  P. IV. 2. 22 ] The month of mārgaśīrṣa.
